title: Moncli python get items by columns values

posts.author: rcgonzalo (Gonzalo Retamal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!, I am trying to get items by board but I want to filter by column value. How can I do it?

I read this doc 2. Using Moncli · trix-solutions/moncli Wiki · GitHub
but I didn’t find get_items_by_column_values example to filter.

any suggestion I will appreciate

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @rcgonzalo and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

To be transparent, I do not have experience using Moncli, so lets hope someone in the community who does, can give you a hand

Cheers,
Matias
